div.h1: GDT Entry Layout and Bit Fields
div.p: Global Descriptor Table — 8-byte Segment Descriptor Structure

g.text: 0 | A | Accessed (set by CPU on access)
0x9A | Kernel Code | P=1 DPL=0 S=1 Type=1010
0x92 | Kernel Data | P=1 DPL=0 S=1 Type=0010
0xFA | User Code | P=1 DPL=3 S=1 Type=1010
0xF2 | User Data | P=1 DPL=3 S=1 Type=0010
5 | L | Long mode (1=64-bit, must be 0 for 32-bit)
mov ds, ax // Actually points to same as 0x10!
